hooks.command: bash -c 'f=$(grep -oP '"'"'"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]*'"'"'); [[ "$f" == *.py && "$f" == */modules/* ]] && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" && uv run ruff format "$f" || true'
bash -c 'f=$(grep -oP '"'"'"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]*'"'"'); [[ "$f" == *.ts && "$f" == */_mcp_server/* ]] && cd _mcp_server && npx biome check --write "$f" || true'

bash -c 'changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null); py=$(echo "$changed" | grep "^modules/.*\.py$" || true); ts=$(echo "$changed" | grep "^_mcp_server/.*\.ts$" || true); ok=true; if [ -n "$py" ]; then echo "=== Python checks ==="; uv run ruff check modules/ || ok=false; uv run ruff format --check modules/ || ok=false; uv run pyright 2>&1 | tail -5 || ok=false; uv run python scripts/sync_modules.py --check || ok=false; fi; if [ -n "$ts" ]; then echo "=== TypeScript checks ==="; cd _mcp_server && npx tsc --noEmit || ok=false; npx biome check || ok=false; fi; $ok'
